name: contact-email-only-asks-followup-before-logo
description: User at WEB_COLLECT_CONTACT replies with just an email ('Email is bytes@bytes.com'). Bot must NOT silently move on to the logo step — it should save the email AND ask 'want to add a phone or address too, or skip?'. Real tester from May 7 — bot accepted email and immediately moved to logo, the user was about to add a phone but never got the chance. Now sets contactFollowupAsked flag, stays in WEB_COLLECT_CONTACT for one more turn.
